official_test_qr.description: Official test QR code for PayMongo QR Ph integration
supported_methods: Banks (BPI, UnionBank, Metrobank, PNB, and more)
instructions: 1. When payment screen shows, you can use this official test QR code
2. Scan with any supported banking app
3. Complete test transaction to verify webhook integration
4. Monitor backend logs for payment status updates
official_test_qr.notes: This is an official test QR code connected to the PayMongo merchant account. Use for development and testing only.
